ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "maori" INTEGER /* Number of individuals identified as Māori */,
  "pacific_peoples" INTEGER /* Number of individuals identified as Pacific peoples */,
  "asian" INTEGER /* Number of individuals identified as Asian */,
  "european_or_other" INTEGER /* Number of individuals identified as European or other */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals in the age group */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic location */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 0 to 59) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "start_age" INTEGER /* Starting age of the group */,
  "end_age" INTEGER /* Ending age of the group */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the age group is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnic_groups" (
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnic group */,
  "ethnic_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnic group (e.g., Māori) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnic group */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ethnic group is active */,
  "subgroups" TEXT /* List of subgroups within the ethnic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnic_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnic_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnic demographic record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data record */,
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnic group */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of individuals in this ethnic group within the demographic data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic location */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ethnic_demographics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ethnic_demographics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ethnic_demographics_ethnic_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnic_group_id") REFERENCES ethnic_groups ("ethnic_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data record */,
  "health_condition" TEXT /* Name of the health condition */,
  "prevalence" REAL /* Prevalence of the health condition in the demographic group */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic location */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the health condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher within the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the researcher belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the researcher's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL link to the data source for reference */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data source was updated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly, special) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data relationship */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data used in the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how the data was used in the report */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data used in the report */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reporting ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., city, region) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the location is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
